cohort.label: Cancer (1 year windows post-diagnosis)
cohort.description: Patients with a first malignant-cancer diagnosis (SNOMED 443392 and descendants), excluding non-melanoma skin cancer (BCC/SCC) and carcinoma in situ. The document window is the 365 days starting at that first diagnosis. Patients must have at least 365 days of observation_period coverage both before and after the index date, so 'first' is meaningful and the follow-up window is fully observed.
